summary: Completed end-to-end testing of SBJ — House of Cinematic Heritage MVP. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed covering root, collections (list + per-slug + 404), and all three lead types (consultation, reservation, concierge) with create+list+filter assertions. Frontend: all 5 collection routes, home hero, Bridal Journey 4-step questionnaire + contact step + submit, Reserve form submit, Showroom page, WhatsApp concierge open/close, and mobile nav drawer all work as expected.

issues: Floating WhatsApp concierge button (bottom-right, fixed) is visually overlapped by the platform-level 'Made with Emergent' badge at the same screen corner. The button is still clickable in real layouts (z-index ok) but in some viewports the badge can intercept hits. Consider nudging the WA button up (e.g., bottom-20 instead of bottom-6) to avoid badge overlap during preview.

action_items: Minor: nudge WhatsApp concierge button (WhatsAppConcierge.jsx) up to bottom-20 (or right-20) so it doesn't visually collide with the Emergent preview badge in bottom-right.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside route handlers (lines 325/333/341) but defined at module bottom (line 367). It works because handlers run after import-time, but it is fragile and confusing — move logger setup above route definitions.
Home.jsx is 432 lines — borderline; consider extracting Manifesto, TempleUniverse, Museum, Craftsmanship, BridalTeaser sections into separate components for maintainability.
Home.jsx imports `useRef` but does not use it — dead import.
GET /api/leads has no auth — anyone with the URL can list all leads (PII: name + phone). This is fine for an internal MVP but should be flagged for Phase 2 (add admin auth).
ConsultationLead.email uses Optional[str] not EmailStr — silent acceptance of malformed emails. Pydantic EmailStr is already imported but unused.
Reservation `party_size` has no upper bound on the backend (UI caps at 12); add validation `Field(ge=1, le=20)` to prevent abuse.
CORS is `*` with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed requests; set explicit origins for production.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_-prefixed leads (1 consultation, 1 reservation, 1 concierge) via API during pytest run. They remain in the leads collection and can be cleaned by deleting TEST_-prefixed docs if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all current endpoints. Frontend cinematic intro can be bypassed by setting sessionStorage 'sbj-intro-seen'='1' via page.add_init_script BEFORE navigation. The Emergent preview badge overlaps the WhatsApp FAB in bottom-right — use page.evaluate to hide it or click via locator without force in tests if you see flakiness. WhatsApp deep-link verified: https://wa.me/919030895440?text=...
